name: Bread Salad with Tomatoes (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound slightly dried out Italian bread - cut into 1-inch thick slices
salt and dried red pepper flakes
4 vine ripened medium tomatoes, washed - and cut into chunks (seeds and all)
salt and freshly ground black pepper
1/2 cup torn fresh stemmed basil leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Set bread slices in the bottom of a bowl and cover them with cool water; let stand while you make the dressing.
2. In another mixing bowl combine the olive oil, vegetable oil, balsamic vinegar, and 1 tablespoon of white wine vinegar; mix and season with salt and dried red pepper flakes. If desired, drizzle in more vinegar to achieve the desired tanginess.
3. After 15 minutes of soaking the bread, squeeze it dry, remove as much of the crust as possible, and cut into large chunks.
4. Toss the bread, red onion, tomatoes, and basil with the dressing; adjust seasoning if needed.
5. Let stand for 30 minutes at room temperature before serving.
6. If desired, serve with slices of fresh mozzarella cheese for added protein.
